## What this changes


## Checklist
- [ ] New/changed component has all four files (`.jsx`, `.d.ts`, `.prompt.md`, `@dsCard` card)
- [ ] Card renders on the white `var(--card)` canvas and shows key states
- [ ] All colors/radii/shadows/fonts reach through the token layer (no hard-coded hex)
- [ ] Dark mode verified (semantic tokens only)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated; `package.json` version bumped if the public API changed
- [ ] Did NOT commit `_ds_bundle.js`, `_ds_manifest.json`, `_adherence.oxlintrc.json`
